return(function(P,F,w,W,p,d,o,s,t,J,R,z,b,S,V,M,q,c,U,C,x,G,A)c,b,z,A,G,M,V,C,S,R,s,U,x,t,J,q={},function(P)local a,R=-14813-(-14814),P[-857951+857952]while R do F=s(a)local w=function(w)return R(P,{w},a,F)end return w end,function(R,w,W,p)local N,g,o,Q,dt,K,v,u,y,M,O,i,D,Pt,L,e,h,Ft,s,f,T,k,b,wt,Z,I,at,B,X,U,r,m,J,Wt,Y,n,l,E,H,pt,Rt,j while R do if
